title: selaginella debilis
intro: Selaginella debilis, also known as the weak spikemoss, is a type of ancient, vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella debilis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an anti-cancer agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human consumption.
